reply_original: Thank you so much! We're thrilled you love the variety and our AI. We're constantly working to bring you even more unique characters to connect with. If you ever have ideas or need support, we're always here at support@fantachat.ai. Enjoy your journey!
reply_zh: 非常感谢！我们很高兴您喜欢我们丰富的选择和我们的AI。我们一直在努力为您带来更多可以交流的独特角色。如果您有任何想法或需要支持，可以随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。祝您旅程愉快！
